response.justification: Mohammed Al-Said is a web and full-stack software developer whose entire career has been focused on application-layer software, GIS platforms, and direct mail automation. The role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. The candidate's performance work is limited to software-level low-latency optimizations in web microservices, which is several abstraction layers removed from the silicon-level and deep-learning workload analysis this position demands.
strengths: Demonstrated low-latency and high-throughput optimization experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Broad multi-language technical background showing adaptability across systems (C/C++, DLang, Node.js, embedded contexts)
Leadership and communication experience through workshops, talks, and open-source project stewardship
concerns: Zero evidence of SoC or IP modeling, GPU architecture, or any hardware-level design work
No AI, machine learning, or deep neural network training/inference experience whatsoever
Educational background (BS CS + BA Fine Arts, no advanced degree) requires 8+ years of directly relevant experience, which is entirely absent here
